summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fase 3 - Log de Contatos endpoints. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed critical bug in ExcluirContatoUseCase where role comparison used string instead of enum value.

critical.issue: Role comparison bug: `usuario.role != 'admin'` should be `usuario.role.value != 'admin'` since role is RoleUsuario enum - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Role comparison should use enum value property (.value) when comparing with strings
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for easy identification and cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 3 - Log de Contatos is fully functional. All CRUD operations, statistics, returns management, and role-based access control working correctly.

reference_endpoints.GET /api/contatos/tipos: PASS - Returns 6 contact types (ligacao, whatsapp, email, presencial, sms, outro) with value/label/color/icon
reference_endpoints.GET /api/contatos/resultados: PASS - Returns 7 contact results (sucesso, nao_atendeu, caixa_postal, numero_errado, sem_resposta, pendente, agendado) with value/label/color
reference_endpoints.GET /api/contatos/motivos: PASS - Returns 10 contact motives (documentacao, acompanhamento, confirmacao, reembolso, pendencia, informacao, desistencia, boas_vindas, lembrete, outro)

statistics_endpoints.GET /api/contatos/stats: PASS - Returns total, sucesso, sem_sucesso, taxa_sucesso, retornos_pendentes, contatos_hoje, por_tipo, por_resultado
statistics_endpoints.GET /api/contatos/retornos: PASS - Returns pendentes, atrasados, total_pendentes, total_atrasados

crud_operations.POST /api/contatos: PASS - Creates new contact with pedido_id, tipo, resultado, motivo, descricao, contato_nome, contato_telefone, contato_email, data_retorno
crud_operations.POST /api/contatos (with return): PASS - Creates contact with scheduled return date
crud_operations.POST /api/contatos (short descricao): PASS - Returns 422 for description less than 5 chars
crud_operations.GET /api/contatos/pedido/{pedido_id}: PASS - Lists all contacts for a pedido with resumo and contatos array
crud_operations.GET /api/contatos/{contato_id}: PASS - Returns single contact with all fields including labels

return_workflow.POST /api/contatos/{contato_id}/marcar-r: PASS - Returns 400 if no return scheduled

authentication.Admin login: PASS - Returns valid token with admin role
authentication.Assistente login: PASS - Returns valid token with assistente role
authentication.Consultor login: PASS - Returns valid token with consultor role

role_comparison_fix.reason: usuario.role is a RoleUsuario enum, not a string; comparing enum to string always returns True, blocking all deletions
